input.background: Exercise 18.3 found that 43% of CMV+ patients experienced arterial restenosis within 6 months of atherectomy. In contrast, 8% of CMV- patients experienced a similar outcome. Table 18.8 contains observed counts.
input.data:
Table 18.8 Data for Exercise 18.3 and 18.9. Restenosis within 6 months of angioplasty by CMV serological status.

\begin{tabular}{lc|c|}
\hline & \multicolumn{1}{c}{ Restenosed } & \multicolumn{1}{c}{ Did not restenose } & \multicolumn{1}{c}{ Total }\
\hline
\hline CMV + & 21 & 28 & 49 \
\hline CMV- & 2 & 24 & 26 \
\hline Total & 23 & 49 & 75 \
\hline
\end{tabular}
input.question: Use a chi-square statistic to test the association for statistical significance.

output.answer: X_stat^2 = 9.879, df = 1, P = 0.0017. With continuity-correction, X^2_stat,c = 8.294, df = 1, P = 0.0040.
